description: Beebole is a great tool for our team. It's easy to use, efficient, and customizable, which for us was the most important.
author: Vikesh V.
pros: Beebole integrates with Excel, thanks to their add-in, and this makes accessing and analyzing time tracking data even easier. In general, it's super easy to create and customize the exact reports we want for managing both time and expenses. Plus their customer service is a 10. They always get back to me quickly and with a real person behind the messages.
cons: There's a learning curve at the beginning, but once you understand the tool, it couldn't be easier to use.

description: Beebole Project is reliable and it makes every projects reliable.
author: Diaferia A.
pros: Beebole Project has competent cost management that allows businesses thrive.
cons: Beebole Project is strategic and helps firms perfectly.

description: Its been really useful and easy to use the product. The support team from Beebole has always been prompt on responses. The documentation on Beebole is also very well organized.
author: Aman R.
pros: Its easier to navigate and use the product. Training my team has been easy because of the knowledge base documents in the Beebole inventory.
cons: As a data guy POV, I wish the API could handle more data that can be leveraged for reporting outside of Beebole.

description: Easy to use, it helps a lot in tracking the hours worked, especially for developers and project managers who work on several projects at the same time in the company.
author: Andrej P.
pros: Ease of entering hours, creating projects and tasks.
cons: Setting the filter for the report and overall look of PDF timesheet (extraction of the report).

description: Overall, I am very pleased. The support we got while going through implementation was quite good and fast.
author: Steve R.
pros: Easy to implement and straight-forward API. Support is fantastic.
cons: API could be more robust and I wish there were a way to view the whole database and bulk updates (which would be useful during conversion. e.g. restarting)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: This is definitely an upgrade to our previously excel based timesheets. Information is secured and trustworthy, nothing gets erased by mistake, and you can track in real time how much has been spent on each project. I would say that it can be improved though, for example, adding an end date to projects would be good, to avoid people billing on already finished projects. Overall, I would say that it takes a while to figure out how to parameter and use it properly, but once you do, it becomes a very helpful tool, and the Beebole team is always here to help. We are glad to have selected it!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is very easy to record hours, the interface looks good and is customizable. The reports allow you to display or extract the data under many forms, easily accessing the information you need in a timely manner.
cons: It takes some time to figure out how to best use it, for example, a lot of our users keep sending in their timesheets when they only wanted to save them, or get lost with the timeframe feature. It is not completely intuitive.

review_title: Superb tool for all time captures and reports
description: Easy to use, very durable, and I can't stress enough the flexibility of the reporting functions. As someone who does daily reporting on time sheets per project, this function is the perfect set of tools that just cuts my report deliver time in half.
author: Maria H.
pros: Its quick, efficient and reliable! Flexible with different tabs and categories and the reporting function is easy to use. I particularly love the flexible column options with the report functions. makes life so much easier when exporting to fill reports premade to these specs.
cons: The overtime calculations and absences are a little difficult to reconcile. The way it calculates, doesn't remove the time from the day listed so we get an issue where the day is marked with hours of 8 for a normal day but the overtime is also 8 hours which is impossible. However, this may be a set up/user issue rather than a software issue. Perhaps a set of training videos or how-to guides might be useful in the member areas?
author_profession: Project Administrator, Business, and Finance Support

description: Overall, it is a good experience as it does what it should do, and is relatively easy to use for the user.
author: Aqib N.
pros: How easy the interface is to use when recording time spent on each project, as it clearly states how many hours you should be meeting per day and per week
cons: How hard the interface is to use for management when tracking hours logged and downloading reports, in relation to inputting the dates.

review_title: Efficient, Lightweight time and project tracking
description: Great. It is the source-of-truth at our organization.
author: Brad F.
pros: I lead a project management team for a contract research organization in pharma. We use Beebole to understand time spent against individual purchase orders. Beebole offers an at-a-glance budget tracking system, timesheets, an approval workflow, and exporting for invoicing.
cons: The reporting, while comprehensive, is a bit cumbersome to use at times. I would appreciate the ability to have project burndown charts available.

description: I use it most days and it's very straightforward and simple.
author: Grace H.
pros: Simple UI, easy to track my time and find what I need.
cons: Not always intuitive to find things in menus

description: Once you know how to use it very good, especially when you have a few time sheets to complete.
author: Graham K.
pros: They layout is nice and clear simple to use. I like you can fill them in for your staff when they forget or off work.
cons: I wasn’t shown how to use it, had to learn by myself, worked it out by clicking a few buttons, In didn't see and guidance buttons or links to help with this.

description: My overall experience has been error-free, user friendly and fast.
author: Chase G.
pros: Beebole is very easy to use. The charge code selection is straight forward, corrections are simple and approving time cards is very fast and easy to do.
cons: I wish the filtering and report function was easier to use for managers.

author: Sneha S.
pros: I can easily log my hours for different tasks, and the real-time reports help me keep track of my billable hours, ensuring I'm always on top of my work.
cons: when I try to run reports on extensive project histories, it sometimes takes a while to load, which can be frustrating when I'm in a hurry.

review_title: After few years, still best time tracking solution
description: We still use a lot of other time tracking solutions depending on client requirements. And so far, we haven't seen better suited solution for our needs.
author: Aleksandar J.
pros: It's very flexible and customizable. You can set up and structure time tracking to suit various scenarios. As a small and agile organization, we were often in situations where we had to adapt our time tracking needs for our clients. Beebole helped us to meet those requirements and avoid having several solutions.
cons: With great flexibility comes a little steeper learning curve. It takes some time to understand all features and the best way to achieve your needs. It is still very simple for most of the end-users, quick and intuitive (which is 95% of all users). But power users (finance & managers) are struggling a bit and need a bit more help and supervision around some common misconceptions and misunderstandings.

description: We've been using BeeBole for many years, and we have never thought about switching to another platform. The system's ease of use and our employees' satisfaction with BeeBole make it our best choice. The speed and helpfulness of their Support also deserves praise.
author: Matyas P.
pros: BeeBole is a user-friendly, intuitive, easy to use timesheet system. The initial training for a new employee takes less than 30 minutes, and we barely have any user issues (even those are resolved easily in-house). The timesheet easily works with our internal resource allocation system.
cons: Everything we use BeeBole for, works perfectly. There are no cons to the system, only room for development. E.g. it would be great to see a function for time/resource planning, as well.

review_title: To my knowledge, the best time tracking software for complex projects
description: This is an extremely good application that offers enough flexibility to be able to meet a wide range of organization needs in terms of time management and expenses.
author: Anca C.
pros: - detailed and customizable reporting functionality - extensive functionality documentation- easy to use interface for time registration- diverse functionality
cons: - group management could be improved. I would prefer to see all users of a group in one list and modify access there, instead of doing that from the user profile.

review_title: Straightforward but powerful time registration tool!
description: I have found the tool very effective in creating monthly reports for team leads and finance. Also applying some post-processing (by means of a spreadsheet) is very easy thanks to all the metadata that can be added to time entries such as custom field values and groups.
author: Filippo C.
pros: The SW is nicely structured in modules, and every screen is highly customizable depending on your needs and role in the organisation. The best thing by far is the support these guys are providing: even when hitting the limits of the tool on a given use case, the online chat is always the easiest way to get in touch with them and get support in a matter of a couple of hours tops!
cons: Management of which users get to view which projects to book their hours on is not the simplest thing to configure when managing complex setups (e.g. by default every new sub-project/project/company is visible to everybody - or inherits by its parent). When pushing the tool to its limits, especially when trying to move hours across projects and companies, it can be hard to get it right because the manual intervention required can be error prone. A recent update has improved this aspect (no more need for export and import data), however there are still a number limitations (e.g. hours cannot be moved from a project to a sub-project).

author: John S.
pros: Beebole Project brings every time in to account, where workers ensure that they are productive and reliable.
cons: Beebole Project has proper time reporting measures, where no functional challenges.

author: Jeff T.
pros: This software is a very high value - it is highly customizable, which is very rare at this price point.
cons: In over eleven years of use, we have no complaints with the software or customer service.

description: Able now to increase productivity in invoicing
author: Matthew H.
pros: Very easy to use once set up. Associates and staff all like the ease of use
cons: As with most things, there could always be some extra abilities but they are usually dependent on individual needs.

review_title: Simple and intuitive tool for logging your work hours
author: Randall H.
pros: My company used different timesheet tracking tools in the past, but the one I liked the most and that my company used in the end was BeeBole. The user interface is simple and easy to fill out. Depending on how it is set up for you, you may have the ability to modify hours logged on previous days, which other timesheet tools often may not allow you. The ability to show and hide rows is also neat as you don't lose the data when you remove a row, just the visibility is removed. I like the row colors too.
cons: This isn't a problem with the tool but rather with how the company configured it for its users. But whenever I need to charge hours towards a charge code that isn't in my available codes, I have to reach to our HR to request the code be added to my list. I wish we had the ability to add our own charge codes, and then HR can later validate it - to me that would make it more flexible.

description: Excellent! We have used the product since our company started in 2013.
author: Emily K.
pros: User-friendliness, extremely responsive support, reporting functions, and user categories.
cons: Would love to have more options to customize reminders to staff about submitting time.

description: I'ts been great overall for our needs. I would (and do) recommend to clients with similar needs to our own.
author: Luca G.
pros: Simplicity and very tight scope focused on time capture against client projects.
cons: The user interface is clever in that it's highly configurable (a smart concept), but as much as this works in it's favour, it also hinders navigability through the data and forces some design concessions which can make the user experience weaker for rich usage patterns. The API still has areas for improvement relating to primary and external keys for some data sets , as well as limitations in some retrieval queries.

description: Support team is amazing
author: Melissa D.
pros: It's easy to use as a user and explain to new employees as a trainer. It's easy to use to pull the reports that are needed.
cons: Once you get the product setup correctly it's easier to use but the click/drag function to a new user is a pain. It is also hard to ensure what the other users are viewing. We have sensitive information and we want to ensure that is not conveyed to a project manager, the settings feature is very confusing.

description: It's been simple and great!
author: Carmen M.
pros: The timing system and the ability to see what everyone has worked on.
cons: I havent dug in enough but not being able to export direct to a Google sheet, which I use for client status reports.
